calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-11-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on WED-FEB-11-2015:
Michael J. McLaughlin, Esq. for Appellant/Plaintiff LILY ESTEBAN, who is also present;
Jeff Solano, Respondent/Defendant in Propria Persona;
Kathleen Santos, Respondent/Defendant in Propria Persona;
Lynn Mahr, Respondent/Defendant/Cross Complainant in Propria Persona.

This cause comes on calendar, as assigned by Department 206, for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Lily Wang Esteban, Appellant/Plaintiff, testifies on her own behalf under direct examination by Mr. McLaughlin. The following documentary evidence are introduced:
Exhibit 1 - Agreement to Resolve Differences
Exhibit 2 - Complaint filed
Exhibit 3 - Comcast Bill
Exhibit 4 - Agreement

Lyn Mahr, Respondent/Defendant/Cross Complainant, testifies on her own behalf in the narrative. The following documentary evidence are introduced:
Exhibit (not marked) - Restraining Order
Exhibit (not marked) - Letter
Exhibit (not marked) - Amended Tenant Petition

Jeff Santos, Respondent/Defendant, testifies on his own behalf in the narrative. The following documentary evidence is introduced.
Exhibit B - Email

Kathleen Santos, Respondent/Defendant, testifies on her own behalf in the narrative.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submiission. All exhibits are returned to the offering parties.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported; Dept. 613.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2015 Set For Trial On Feb-11-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 613

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-11-2015 Continued To Feb-11-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
